buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-semibold shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(16,185,129,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(16,185,129,0.5)] transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-medium border border-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-800 transition-all

cards.glass: bg-slate-950/50 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 hover:border-emerald-500/30 transition-colors duration-300 rounded-2xl p-8

layout_strategies.hero: Split layout: Left (Copy + CTA) | Right (Interactive Visualization/Mockup). Background: Animated gradient mesh or 'Orbital' constellation SVG.
layout_strategies.features: Bento Grid: Mixed span cards (col-span-1, col-span-2) to create visual rhythm. Use icons + short text.
layout_strategies.timeline: Vertical connection line with pulsing nodes for 'How it Works' steps.
layout_strategies.comparison: Interactive tabs or slider comparing 'Black Box AI' vs 'ChurnGuard Explainable AI'.

strategies.page_load: Staggered fade-up for all hero elements.
strategies.micro: Icon pulses, border drawing effects on cards.

assets.icons: Lucide React (Shield, Activity, Network, Lock, Zap, GitBranch, Users, Search)

images.dashboard_mock: CSS-only Glassmorphic representation PREFERRED over screenshot. Create a container with a sidebar, header, and 2-3 dummy charts using Recharts.

implementation_steps.description: Initialize React + Vite + Tailwind project structure.
Install dependencies: framer-motion, lucide-react, clsx, tailwind-merge, recharts.
Setup Tailwind Config (Fonts, Colors, Animations). Add 'Plus Jakarta Sans' via Google Fonts import in index.css.
Create basic UI components (Button, Card, Badge) in /src/components/ui.
Implement Navbar (Sticky, Blur, Theme Toggle, GitHub Star).
Build Hero Section with 'Orbital' visual and Gradient Glow.

do: Use 'Emerald' (#10B981) for primary actions and 'Teal' (#14B8A6) for gradients.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast against the dark background.
Use 'Glassmorphism' (backdrop-blur) for cards and sticky navs.
Make the 'Star on GitHub' button prominent.
Mobile-First: Stack grids on mobile, expand on desktop.
dont: Do NOT use purple or pink (stick to Emerald/Teal/Cyan).
Do NOT use generic stock photos of people shaking hands.
Do NOT clutter the UI - keep whitespace (negative space) generous.
Do NOT use default browser fonts - load Plus Jakarta Sans.

logo_concept.description: Orbital Constellation: A central shield icon (Emerald) surrounded by 3 orbiting nodes (Cyan, Teal, White) connected by thin lines. Use CSS animation to rotate the orbits.
logo_concept.implementation: Combine Lucide 'Shield' icon with absolute positioned 'div' dots rotating along a border-radius track.
